name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent cash flow projections cause missed opportunities for reinvestment. We provide automated cash flow forecasting instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent cash flow projections lead to missed opportunities for reinvestment.
features: manual entry of payments and expenses
